General.Name: SG GROUP HLDGS
General.Description: SG Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the provision of apparel designing and sourcing services for branded fashion retailers and wholesalers. It operates through Online Fashion Retailers, Fashion Retailers, and Consultation Services segments. The Online Fashion Retailers segment supplies apparel products with designing and sourcing services to online fashion retailers. The Fashion Retailers segment supplies apparel products with designing and sourcing services to fashion retailers. The Consultation Services segment offers consultation services, primarily to apparel and footwear manufacturers, including the assistance services to comply with the corporate social responsibility standards requirements; fashion trend forecast analysis; design specifications; and introducing potential customers. The company also provides quality assurance services; and operates a showroom. It operates in the United Kingdom, the People's Republic of China, Germany, the United States, Hong Kong, Ireland, Singapore, Spain, and Internationally. The company was formerly known as S&G Holdings Co. Ltd. SG Group Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Kwai Chung, Hong Kong. SG Group Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of JC Fashion International Group Limited.
